name: @mcowger/pi-env-var-provider
description_en: Pi extension: register a custom OpenAI-compatible provider from environment variables. Configure baseUrl, apiKey, and models via env vars without editing models.json.
description_zh: Pi 扩展：从环境变量注册自定义的 OpenAI 兼容提供商。通过环境变量配置 baseUrl、apiKey 和 models，无需编辑 models.json。
